summary: Subgroups feature testing complete. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The 'Reporting to the CEO' subgroup displays correctly under Exec_and_Head with Tebogo Joseph Leshope as leader and 10 members.

issues: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Backend subgroup endpoints correctly implemented with proper access control (_check_admin_or_tech_support)
GET /api/division-groups correctly includes subgroups with populated members and leader objects
Subgroup member management allows users from ANY division (not restricted to parent division) - correct per requirements
Frontend DivisionGroupsPage.jsx correctly renders subgroups with expandable sections and management buttons
Search functionality correctly filters by subgroup name in addition to division/member names
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subgroups feature fully tested and working. Key features verified: 1) GET /api/division-groups returns all divisions with their subgroups (members and leader populated). 2) POST /api/division-groups/{name}/subgroups creates new subgroups. 3) PUT /api/subgroups/{id} renames subgroups and updates leader. 4) POST/DELETE /api/subgroups/{id}/members/{user_id} adds/removes members. 5) DELETE /api/subgroups/{id} deletes subgroups. 6) Access control enforced - only admin/super_admin/Technical Support division users can manage subgroups. 7) Frontend shows stats with '1 Subgroups' count. 8) Exec_and_Head division shows 'Reporting to the CEO' subgroup with leader badge. 9) Subgroup expand shows 10 members. 10) All management buttons (Rename, Delete, Leader, Add) visible and functional for admin. 11) Create Subgroup dialog opens with name input. 12) Rename dialog pre-fills current name. 13) Search filters by subgroup name.

Backend_API_Tests.GET_division_groups_includes_subgroups: PASS - Returns groups with subgroups array including members and leader
Backend_API_Tests.subgroup_has_leader_info: PASS - 'Reporting to the CEO' has Tebogo Joseph Leshope as leader

Frontend_UI_Tests.Leshope_shown_as_leader: PASS - 'Tebogo Joseph Leshope' shown with leader badge
Frontend_UI_Tests.Create_Subgroup_button_works: PASS - Dialog opens with name input
